<size=22>受事件机制影响，该关卡无法在第10列种植植物: <size=22>Plants cannot be placed in Column 10 due to level mechanics!
<size=18>......你是自己融合了一个地刺花盆吗，你要知道地刺花盆是不:
<size=18>... Did you just fuse a Spike Pot on your own?
You should know Spike Pots are not counted towards area calculations. Also, at certain waves,
plants on <color=red>all Spike Pots</color> will be checked for area requirements. I think it's best if you shovel it...
<size=20>受事件影响，此关卡禁用玩偶南瓜: <size=20>Joker Pumpkin is disabled in this level due to level mechanics!
<size=18><size=18>......如果你没听懂的话，这个关卡融合地:
<size=18><size=18>In case you didn't catch that, fusing Spike Pot in this level has no benefit.
Not only does it have no attack power, it also adds another area requirement for you to deal with... Got it now?
<size=18>lol那就随你了，我到底为什么要浪费时间给地刺花盆写这么多提示:
<size=18>Lol, fine, have it your way.
Why did I even waste so much time writing Spike Pot tips anyway?
(maybe just to make the lives of us translators worse)
<size=20>进行面积判定时可能会略有卡顿，请稍作等候: <size=20>Slight lag may occur during area calculations, please wait a moment.
<size=18>tip：小丑爆炸不会伤害到地刺花盆，保护好你自己种植的植物即可:
<size=18>JITB explosions can't damage Spike Pots. Just protect your own plants.
Spike Pots <color=red>DO NOT</color> count toward area calculations.
All empty tiles are treated as having an area of 0.
<size=18>tip：你可以使用南瓜或者花盆这类可叠种的植物来灵活调整面积: <size=18>Use stackable plants like Pumpkin or Flower Pot to adjust area sizes flexibly.
<size=18>如果在第5波前没有进行任何右键操作，游戏将开启<color=#:
<size=18>If you do not right-click before Wave 5, the level will enable <color=#79FF79>compat mode</color>
In compat mode, planting down plants measures the area of specific zones.
<size=18><color=#79FF79>兼容模式已开启</color>\:
<size=18><color=#79FF79>Compat mode enabled</color>
You can plant down <color=#CF9E9E>Omni Pumpkin</color> to view the area of plants.
要求的面积区间会在3~5中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 3 to 5
要求的面积区间会在2~8中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 2 to 8
要求的面积区间会在2~14中抽取: The required area size will be randomly picked from 2 to 14
本关开局就是最高的出怪倍率，你有150秒的布阵时间\n每一大波会出现类似领袖的精:
This level starts with the highest spawn multipiler possible, you'll have 150 seconds of setup time to prepare.
Elite zombies similar to the mini-bosses will show up on huge waves, each representing <color=#000000>Omega Assassin Squad</color>, <color=#00E3E3>Pozeidon</color>, <color=#BEBEBE>Jackson Worldwide</color>, <color=#600000>Giga Football Striker</color>, <color=#FF0000>Queen </color><color=#2828FF>Jill-in-the-Box</color>, <color=#820041>Giga Football Archduke</color>, <color=#5E005E>Abyssal Gargantuar</color>, and <color=#D200D2>Mecha Skystrider</color>. Be prepared.
Remember to view modifiers for the best experience.
毁灭行动小组已支援！: The Doom Army has sent backup!
战车急袭小组已入侵！: The Battle Vehicle squad has invaded!
黑橄榄袭击小组已入侵！: The Giga Football Team has invaded!
樱桃爆破小组已支援！: The Cherry Army has sent backup!
快速反应小组准备中！: Emergency backup is on the way!
重装小队准备中！: The Heavy Weapons Team has sent troops on their way!
重装小组已到达！: The Heavy Weapons Team's troops have arrived!
樱桃主力进攻组已到达！: The main forces of the Cherry Army have arrived!
警告！检测到黑橄榄大帅，立即击杀！: Warning! Giga Football Archduke has been detected! Kill him immediately!
黑橄榄部队已入侵！: Warning! Giga Football Striker and his team has invaded!
警告！黑机鱼重装部队已入侵花园！: Warning! Ultra Mecha-nut and it's robots have invaded!
主力战斗小队已到达！: The main forces of The Garden have arrived!!
毁灭清扫5队已抵达花园: The Doom Extermination Team has arrived!
毁灭装置将在5分钟后引爆: The Doomsday Device will be activated in 5 minutes.
警告。由于不可控的入侵事件，花园将在10分钟后引爆: Warning. Due to uncontrollable invasion events, The Garden will be detonated in 10 minutes.
毁灭装置将在3分钟后引爆: The Doomsday Device will be activated in 3 minutes.
毁灭装置已启动，所有人员立即撤离或立刻击杀所有入侵者（种植三叶草）: The Doomsday Device has been activated, defeat all invaders or else all personnel must evacuate immediately. (Plant the Blover.)
重装主力部队准备中！: The main forces of the Heavy Weapons Team are on their way!
重装主力部队已到达！: The main forces of the Heavy Weapons Team have arrived!
丢 人 现 眼：雪原对花园极其失望，即将派遣急袭小组！: EMBRASSING: The Snowfield Legion is extremely dissapointed in The Garden, and has declared war!
雪原方认为没有出动的必要: The Snowfield Legion believes there is no need for them to assist yet.
雪原部队已支援！: The Snowfield Legion has sent backup!
雪原部队已取得联系！请保护好寒冰莲花: Snow Lotus is contacting The Snowfield Legion! Protect her!
在游戏的过程中，将会以事件的形式刷新大波植物/僵尸\n种植机蛋召唤快速反应小组！:
Throughout the course of this level, large amounts of zombies/plants will arrive in the way of events!
Plant down Mecha-nut to call for emergency backup!
Planting down Pyro Cannon will call for different plants depending on the situation on the lawn. More powerful forces will be called when more dangerous, but they're take longer to arrive.(Press E to view the danger meter, you're in danger if it goes over 60%, and if it reaches 100%......）
In emergency situation, click on the Snow Lily to contact the Snowfield Legion and call for backup. Although, you'd better make sure nothing happens to the Snow Lily in the meanwhile......
外部防线已被破坏！阿尔法军团入侵！: The outer defenses have fallen! The Alpha Assassin legion is invading!
雪原支援仅在植物数低于35且危险值＞60%的情况下可用\n（警告，被铲掉的植物及:
Snowfield will only send support when you have less than 35 plants AND the danger meter is > 60%.
(Warning: Plants that are shoveled and plants that explode will not take away from the plant count!)
Grave Buster can greatly reduced the danger meter!
雪原认为花园没救啦！急袭小组已派遣！: The Snowfield Legion thinks The Garden is done for and has declared war!
部分植物得到了增强或削弱\n手套无cd\n注意，游戏将在17分钟后强制失败\n在:
Some plants have been altered for this level.
The glove has no cooldown this level.
Attention, you will automatically lose this level after 17 minutes.
A Blover seed packet will be given after 10 minutes, plant it to attempt evacuation. (costs 1250 sun, evacuating successfully wins the level.)
Defeating the Abyssal Gargantuar on the last wave also automatically wins you the level.Through coding magic, you can use slow mode to keep text on screen for longer~
If you think this level is too easy, try keeping the usage of plants in the seed slots like Sunflower/Spicicle/Pepper Popper/Hearty Apple to a minimum or none at all.
